message:
feat(fcp-conformance): expand conformance vector generation and test coverage

Improve the conformance test vector infrastructure across the vecgen
engine and all seven vector domains:

vecgen/mod.rs:
- Apply rustfmt to assertion messages and struct initializers
- Add tests for schema registration determinism, core registration
  uniqueness, canonical CBOR serialization, and payload hash stability

vectors/ (capability, core, fcpc, fcps, holder_proof, hpke, signing):
- Expand golden vector sets with additional edge-case inputs and
  boundary conditions for each cryptographic/protocol domain
- Add round-trip serialization tests ensuring vectors survive
  encode → decode → re-encode cycles
- Strengthen version compatibility checks between vector sets
- Apply rustfmt reformatting to long assertion expressions and
  chained method calls throughout

reqcheck/mod.rs:
- Reformat long assert! message for rustfmt compliance

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
